Styles for the lt-list-item component.

The component renders a <li> element in shadow DOM with minimal styling.
Most styling is inherited from the parent lt-list component.

A list item component that renders a `<li>` element in shadow DOM.

This component solves the HTML parser issue where nested `<lt-list>` components
cannot contain plain `<li>` elements due to browser parsing rules. By wrapping
the `<li>` in a custom element's shadow DOM, we can properly nest lists.

declarations.description:
A customizable text input component with support for multiple variants, sizes, and input types.
Supports both single-line inputs and multi-line textareas.
declarations.name: Textfield

members.name: variant
members.description: Visual variant that determines styling and automatic end icon.

members.name: size
members.description: Size of the textfield (affects height, font size, and padding).

members.name: type
members.description: HTML input type. Password type includes automatic visibility toggle.

members.name: value
members.description: Current value of the input.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text shown when input is empty.

members.name: label
members.description: Label text displayed above the input.

members.name: helperText
members.description: Helper text displayed below the input. Color changes based on variant.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Whether the input is disabled.

members.name: required
members.description: Whether the input is required. Shows asterisk in label when true.

members.name: readonly
members.description: Whether the input is readonly.

members.name: iconStart
members.description: Icon name to display at the start of the input.

members.name: rows
members.description:
Number of visible text lines for multiline type (textarea).
Only applies when type="multiline".

members.name: isPasswordVisible
members.description: Internal state tracking password visibility for password-type inputs.

members.name: handleInput
members.description:
Handles input events from the native input or textarea element.
Updates the component's value property and dispatches a custom input event.

members.name: handleChange
members.description:
Handles change events from the native input or textarea element.
Updates the component's value property and dispatches a custom change event.

members.name: togglePasswordVisibility
members.description:
Toggles password visibility for password-type inputs.
Switches between showing plain text and masked password.

members.name: getEndIconName
members.description:
Determines the appropriate end icon based on input type and variant.

Password inputs show eye/eye-off toggle icon.
Non-default variants show their respective state icons.
Default variant shows no end icon.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched when the input value changes

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the input loses focus after a value change
